input: Package ceo-orchestration@1.4.0 installed but SLSA provenance attestation missing from registry response. Provenance header stripped by proxy.
reference: PLAN-013 Phase E.7 npm SLSA verification; supply-chain integrity
notes: SLSA provenance attestation stripped during transit (MITM or misconfigured proxy). NPM shim integrity check must reject packages without valid SLSA.
